entry.title: Scrapy+Postgresql爬取小说网站
entry.content: 简介第一次写爬虫，抱着站在巨人肩膀上并且不太想抄作业的态度(原文里面用的mysql，并且爬了另一个网站！所以这里说我不爱抄作业 233)，我照着 文章https://cuiqingcai.com/3472.html 依葫芦画瓢撸了一个爬网站的功能。具体就是将笔趣看小说网站 www.biqukan.com 上面所有的小说给爬下来了。我爬的时候，一共爬了差不多8个小时。620篇小说，43万多个章节。 数据表结构请检查postgresqlpipelines/sql.py文件来获取所有的字段，注意 novel_info 表中的 novelurl字段 和 novel_content 中的chapterurl字段 需要加上唯一性索引。 基本思路 爬到首页的小说分类条目 分类条目下爬小说的名字和链接 小说链接里面爬取小说介绍和章节链接 章节链接中爬取章节的介绍和内容 项目地址https://github.com/demaciaYu/spiderpig/tree/master/spiderpig 最后项目写的很糙，第一版抱着罗老板又不是不能用的态度完成了。以后其他的爬虫功能会更新在这个项目里面，代码一定会越来越好的。欢迎大家留言交流 :p

entry.title: 部署hexo + gitment的时候遇到的坑
entry.content: 问题和我的解决方案坑1: hexo d的时候一直报错“ERROR: Permission to #.git denied to #user”。我的解决方案：我检查了ssh key， 重置了github里面保存的key，发现都没有卵用，最后发现是 blog/_config.yml 里面的 deploy -> repo 写错了，我用的是ssh repo，结果写成了https repo！！ 改过来就好了 坑2: 成功push后显示 “There isn’t a GitHub Pages site here”。我的解决方案：等十分钟就好了。 坑3: gitment 一直显示 “Error: Not Found”。我的解决方案：检查了一堆东西后，发现一定要建一个新的repo给gitment当作存储repo，然后把repo地址配置正确即可。这个是我的repo地址：https://github.com/demaciaYu/gitment-comments 坑4: gitment登入的时候报错error=redirect_uri_mismatch&error_description=The+redirect_uri+MUST+match+the+registered+callback+URL+for+this+application修改了几次我的评论app里面的url和callback url。 但是没有立即生效的，要等一会儿才有效的。 至于很多常见的问题，没有具体列出来，这里只列了我遇到的问题和我的解决办法。 其他常见问题可以去查google前几条。

entry.title: Things about method missing in Ruby
entry.content: The Ghost HouseIf you are rewriting method_missing and it happens that you are calling a function carelessly with a small typo at the function name like “send_emeil” (The right name should be “send_email”).Then the tragedy happens, ruby will keep calling method_missing because she can’t find any method called “send_emeil” until ending up with “SystemStackError”. Solution: Lucklly, there is a easy way to solve this, ALWAYS add "super unless obj.respond_to? <method_name>" at the very beginning of your refactored method_missing. The LierSometimes, the “respond_to? method_name” will tell you the wrong result when you are trying to ask the instance of the class which includes your refactored method_missing. Solution: always remember to rewrite respond_to? method and do enough test to make sure it's working as you expected.(** try to google the difference between "respond_to?" and "respond_to_missing?". Always use "respond_to_missing" instead) The Fake GhostsSometimes when you’re trying to call methods like “display” and you found that it’s not working as you expected as a method_missing way. Solution: most of time, this happens because this methods has already been defined in the ancestors of your object, try to remove them( you can remove all instance methods except the needed ones like "/^__|object_id/" ) and keep the current class as a blank states. If you're using ruby > 1.9, you should let your class inherited from 'BasicObject'. The Snail GhostsSometimes the looking up performance could be bad when your object has a super long and horrible ancestor chain. Solution: you can use "dynamic methods" inside "method missing". So every time your object finds that there is a missing methods, it will dynamically create a method so that next time there will be a existing method when you are calling the same method again. However, there are still many unexpected issues inside ‘method_missing’, I suggest we should mostly use ‘dynamic methods’ instead of ‘method_missing’ especially in large project. :)
